name: Chicken & Almond Rissoles with Stir- Fried Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cooked potatoes and chicken to make tasty rissoles rolled in chopped almonds.
Serve with stir-fried vegetables.
2. Coarsely grate boiled potatoes and raw carrots into a bowl.
3. Finely chop or grind the chicken. Add to the vegetables, garlic, tarragon/thyme, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the egg yolk (or beaten egg) to bind the ingredients together. Divide the mixture in half and shape into two large ovals.
5. Roll each rissole in the chopped almonds until evenly coated.
6. Place the rissoles in a greased baking dish. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F, about 20 minutes, or until lightly browned. Alternatively, heat a little in a skillet and fry the rissoles until browned all over and cooked through.
7. While the rissoles are baking, prepare the stir-fried vegetables:
- Cut celery and scallions into thin diagonal slices.
- Heat oil in a skillet.
- Add the vegetables and stir-fry over high heat for 1 to 2 minutes.
- Add corn cobs and snow peas and cook for 2 minutes longer.
- Stir in balsamic vinegar and season with salt and pepper.
8. Spoon the stir-fried vegetables onto the serving plate and serve the rissoles beside them. Serve immediately.
